libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. Generate tests against APIs present in org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; do not use removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs. If a test intentionally exercises JavaSerializer, enable pekko.actor.allow-java-serialization = on in that test's ActorSystem config.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would not fix the old org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor imports; the typed actor module exposes org.apache.pekko.actor.typed APIs instead.
DNS-internals coverage may require JVM/native add-exports setup, but meaningful actor/serialization coverage is reachable without that path.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1 is usable as a standalone classic actor artifact with its resolved scala-library and config dependencies; the observed failure is from removed TypedActor APIs, not missing setup.
